columns.extraction_plan: This value is reported as "Median Time (95% Cl; months)" under the "ADT Plus Docetaxel" column in Table 2. Extract the value from the row labeled "Overall," which is 19.4 (16.8 to 22.6).
This value is reported as "Median Time (95% CI; months)" under the "ADT Alone" column in Table 2. Extract the value from the row labeled "Overall," which is 11.7 (10.8 to 14.4).
